zh.Zottegem, East Flanders, Belgium: 比利時奧斯吉福拉安德倫特格姆
zh.lifeSummary: 當Wouter van Zottegem III於1166年出生在法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯貝圖內時，他的父親Gerard Wouter van Zottegem II   Rassegem Massemen Laarne31歲，母親Beatrice de Massemen21歲。他和Alice de Mortagne至少有4個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1220年之後在比利時奧斯吉福拉安德倫特格姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Wouter van Zottegem III于1166年出生在法国諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯貝圖內时，他的父亲Gerard Wouter van Zottegem II   Rassegem Massemen Laarne31岁，母亲Beatrice de Massemen21岁。他和Alice de Mortagne至少有4个儿子和1个女儿。他去世于1220年之后在比利时奧斯吉福拉安德倫特格姆。

nameMeanings.name: van
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Anh, Thanh, Hung, Minh, Vinh, Dung, Hue, Huong, Lan, Quang, Tan, Thuy, Hong, Chi, Hang, Ho, Pok, Sang, Bai, Chin, Ching, Chu, Chuan, Dong.
Vietnamese (Vạn): from the Chinese surname 萬, see Wan 1.
Vietnamese (Văn): from the Chinese surnames 文 or 聞, see Wen 2 and 3, and also 5 below.

variants.name: Wan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Hong, Yi, Qi, Qiang, Wai, Yiu, Yuk, Chien-Min, Fang, Hin, Jichun, Li, Man, Chung, Min, Yiping, Pak, Sik, Sung Man.  Vietnamese Tin, Bang, Da, Hien, Hoi, Lan, Minh Quang, Sau, Tich, Tung, Yaping, Yuet.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 萬, which means ‘ten thousand’ literally or ‘very great number’ figuratively: (i) from the personal name of Bi Wan (畢萬), an official in the state of Jin (located in present-day Shanxi province). He was said to be a descendant of Bi Gong Gao (known as Duke of Bi), the 15th son of the virtuous King Wen of Zhou (reined 1152–1056  BC ). Bi Wan was later granted the fiefdom of Wei (魏), which in 403  BC  became the state of Wei (located in present-day Shanxi, Shaanxi, Henan and Hebei provinces). Some of his descendants adopted Wei (魏) as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his personal name, as their surname. (ii) from the personal name Wan (萬), style name of Rui Bo (芮伯, the Earl of Rui), an official of the Western Zhou dynasty (1046–771  BC ), who was granted the fief Rui (located in Ruicheng in Shaanxi province). Some of his descendants inherited Rui (芮), the name of the fief, as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his style name, as their surname. (iii) from the placename Wan (萬), the name of a fief (located in Juxian in Shandong province) granted during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ) to an official in the ancient state of Chu. (iv) from the first element of the name of the Wan Si (萬俟) family, who lived in the downstream areas of the Yellow River during the Northern Qi dynasty (550–577  AD ). (v) from the second element of the name of the Tu Wan (吐萬) family, who are members of the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 完, meaning ‘complete’ in Chinese: (i) said to be borne by the descendants of Huan Zhui, a grandson of the Duke Huan of Song (ruler of the state of Song, died 651  BC ). (ii) from Wan (完), the name of Qu Wan (屈完), an official in the state of Chu during the Spring and Autumn Period (770–476  BC ). (iii) shortened form of the compound surname Wan-Yan (完顔), a surname from minority ethnic groups such as Juchen ethnic group in ancient northern China.

nameMeanings.name: Wouter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Walther
meanings: from wald ‘rule’ + heri ‘army’; name of the famous medieval minnesinger Walther von der Vogelweide ( c.1170– c.1230 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Wouter van Zottegem III was born in 1166, in Béthune, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, his father, Gerard Wouter van Zottegem II   Rassegem Massemen Laarne, was 31 and his mother, Beatrice de Massemen, was 21. He had at least 4 sons and 1 daughter with Alice de Mortagne. He died after 1220, in Zottegem, East Flanders, Belgium.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Wouter van Zottegem III est né en 1166, à Béthune, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, son père, Gerard Wouter van Zottegem II   Rassegem Massemen Laarne, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Beatrice de Massemen, avait 21 ans. Il a eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille avec Alice de Mortagne. Il est décédé après 1220, à Zottegem, Flandre-Orientale, Belgique.

de.lifeSummary: Als Wouter van Zottegem III 1166 in Béthune, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Gerard Wouter van Zottegem II   Rassegem Massemen Laarne 31 und seine Mutter Beatrice de Massemen 21. Er hatte mit Alice de Mortagne mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb nach 1220 in Zottegem, Ostflandern, Belgien.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Wouter van Zottegem III è nato il nel 1166 nel Béthune, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, il suo padre, Gerard Wouter van Zottegem II   Rassegem Massemen Laarne, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Beatrice de Massemen, aveva 21 anni. Lui avuto almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia con Alice de Mortagne. Morì dopo il 1220, nel Zottegem, Fiandra Orientale, Belgio.

ja.lifeSummary: Wouter van Zottegem IIIが1166年にフランスノード-プアス-デ-カレイスプアス-デ-カレイスブeスウンで生まれた時，父Gerard Wouter van Zottegem II   Rassegem Massemen Laarneは31歳，母Beatrice de Massemenは21歳であった。彼はAlice de Mortagneとの間に少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1220年以後にベルギーオオスト-vラアンデレンゾッテジェムで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Wouter van Zottegem III(이)가 1166년 프랑스 노르드-파스-데-캘레이 파스-데-캘레이 브e툰에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Gerard Wouter van Zottegem II   Rassegem Massemen Laarne(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Beatrice de Massemen(은)는 21세였다. 그는 Alice de Mortagne(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1220년 이후 벨기에 스트-블라아더 즈욧그에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Wouter van Zottegem III nasceu em 1166, em Béthune, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, França, seu pai, Gerard Wouter van Zottegem II   Rassegem Massemen Laarne, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Beatrice de Massemen, tinha 21 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha com Alice de Mortagne. Ele faleceu após 1220, em Zottegem, Flandres Oriental, Bélgica.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Wouter van Zottegem III родился в 1166 г. в местности бeтун, пас-де-калеи, норд-пас-де-калеи, Франция, его отцу по имени Gerard Wouter van Zottegem II   Rassegem Massemen Laarne было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Beatrice de Massemen, 21. У него было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь от Alice de Mortagne. Он умер после 1220 г. в местности зоттегем, уст-влаандирен, Бельгия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Wouter van Zottegem III nació en 1166, en Béthune, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, su papá, Gerard Wouter van Zottegem II   Rassegem Massemen Laarne, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Beatrice de Massemen, tenía 21 años. Tuvo por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija con Alice de Mortagne. Murió después de 1220, en Zottegem, Flandes Oriental, Bélgica.
